## Resources
Feel free to take examples from other code in the `TELEMETRY` folder on how to program in RTOS. `Lora_Transmit` can show how to build queues and read from them. The [FreeRTOS with ESP32 Playlist from Digikey](https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLEBQazB0HUyQ4hAPU1cJED6t3DU0h34bz&si=3NQ-HRB7fF3yPO8r) has a corresponding [Github](https://github.com/ShawnHymel/introduction-to-rtos/tree/main) that has code from all of the videos in a easy to access place. Searching the [FreeRTOS Kernel Developer Docs](https://www.freertos.org/Documentation/02-Kernel/02-Kernel-features/00-Developer-docs) is also recommended to understand basic concepts, though note that the version of RTOS that is on the ESP varies from FreeRTOS. For **specific and precise reference**, refer to the [Espressif FreeRTOS API Reference](https://docs.espressif.com/projects/esp-idf/en/v4.2/esp32/api-reference/system/freertos.html#), and use the search feature. This will provide ***precise*** and accurate documentation on how to use RTOS code in ESP.
